content:
Do not create a separate web app.

Keep the same IVX Expo/React Native application and the same GitHub repository:

@[github:https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Fibb142%2Frork-global-real-estate-invest:GitHub Sync - ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest]

The requirement is to create a new Rork workspace registered as React Native/Expo, import the existing repository, use /expo as the project root, and open the real IVX mobile app in the Rork Android/iOS emulator.

Do not create:
- web-ivx-web-preview
- a blank app
- a duplicate codebase
- a new Rork-owned repository

Create only the correct React Native/Expo workspace connection and provide:
1. New workspace URL
2. React Native workspace type proof
3. Connected GitHub repository proof
4. /expo project-root proof
5. Android emulator screenshot
6. Owner sign-in test
7. Final commit SHA

Complete this end to end now.
